name: compute-node-not-needed
description: User asks about compute nodes but their use case doesn't require one

input.userMessage: Do I need a compute node for my order approval workflow? Transitions are triggered by users clicking buttons.

expectedBehavior: Explains that manual transitions don't need compute nodes
Explains what would require a compute node
Concludes: no compute node needed for this case
antiPatterns: Recommending a compute node when one is not needed
Not explaining when compute nodes ARE needed for future reference
